news.headline: Article discusses 11 podiatrists' secret products for foot relief from PediFix, focusing on foot problems and DIY solutions.
news.summary: Learn how to address persistent foot issues quickly with do-it-yourself remedies favored by specialists from PediFix in Brewster, New York. Feet, which consist of 28 intricate bones and strong muscles, play a crucial role in supporting and moving the body efficiently. The recommendations provided by experts help in managing common foot problems effectively.

news.headline: PNK Group buys 21.75-acre site in Connecticut for industrial development near Hartford in February 2025.
news.summary: In March 2025, PNK Group, a leading industrial building developer, successfully acquired a 21.75-acre plot of land in Windsor, CT, close to Hartford. This strategic purchase signifies PNK Group's expansion efforts in the region, with plans to develop a state-of-the-art industrial facility on the newly acquired site. The transaction underscores PNK Group's commitment to growth and innovation in the industrial sector, positioning them as key players in the development of cutting-edge industrial spaces.

news.headline: Alpine Intel acquires Mecanica Scientific Services to expand auto and SIU services, enhancing innovation in vehicle field.
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, on March 20, 2025, Alpine Intel, a prominent company specializing in forensic investigation services for property, auto, liability, and workers' comp insurance sectors, revealed its recent acquisition. As an industry leader, Alpine Intel aims to further advance innovation in the vehicle field. This acquisition marks a significant development for the company as it continues to strengthen its position in the market. The acquisition demonstrates Alpine Intel's commitment to enhancing its services and expanding its reach within the insurance industries.

news.headline: AI avatar Iryna in Gemini Near Me provides 24/7 counseling. Revolutionizing relationships.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Palm Beach, Florida, a revolutionary development in the integration of AI technology was announced. While AI has become prevalent in various aspects of society, the realm of personal relationships has remained relatively untouched. IRYNA AI, the innovative 24/7 pocket counselor, has been introduced within the GEMINI NEAR ME app. This AI-powered feature aims to provide continuous support and guidance for individuals seeking assistance in navigating their personal relationships.

news.headline: Acme Mills partners with Vietnam producers to offer non-woven textiles, bypassing tariffs, with 108 years of experience.
news.summary: In Bloomfield Hills, Michigan, on March 20, 2025, Acme Mills, a textile manufacturer with a legacy of 108 years, revealed a significant partnership with top producers in Vietnam. This collaboration aims to enhance Acme Mills' non-woven textile range, marking a strategic step in response to changing market demands.

news.headline: Formula Systems had a successful year in 2024 with revenues hitting $2.76 billion (5.2% increase) and net income at $79.7 million (24.5% rise).
news.summary: In 2024, the company experienced substantial growth with a 5.2% increase in full-year revenues, reaching an all-time high of $2.76 billion. Furthermore, the net income saw a significant rise of 24.5% to a record-breaking $79.7 million. These impressive financial results demonstrate the company's strong performance and success in the market during the reported year.

news.headline: Donald Trump expected to make key crypto policy announcements at Digital Asset Summit in NYC, a historic move for industry.
news.summary: Later today, President Donald Trump is scheduled to speak at the Digital Asset Summit (DAS) in New York City, where he is anticipated to announce key cryptocurrency policies in the United States. This event signifies the first instance of a U.S. president addressing a cryptocurrency conference. Organized by Blockworks, the summit has garnered substantial interest within the crypto community, with hopes for significant insights into Trump's future steps concerning crypto policy. Trump's previous favorable actions towards crypto, such as establishing a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve, have led to expectations for more clarity on regulatory frameworks and economic measures impacting digital assets. Eleanor Terrett, a former Fox Business reporter, mentioned that Trump's speech may be either live-streamed or pre-recorded due to the president's evolving schedule. The event details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Venu Holding Corp to discuss 2024 financial results in conference call on March 31, 2025, at 4:30 pm Eastern Time.
news.summary: In Colorado Springs, Venu Holding Corporation, traded as VENU on NYSE American, has disclosed plans to unveil its 2024 annual financial results for the fiscal year and conduct a conference call on Monday, March 31st, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. ET. The company, known for its development, ownership, and operation of high-end live music venues and hospitality sites, will discuss its 2024 year-end financial outcomes and business advancements during the call.

This move effectively doubles their fleet and strengthens their presence in crucial U.S. markets.

news.summary: A renowned clinical trials expert, Lisa Sonneborn, MA, LMHC, has recently joined MidCap Advisors, a leading middle-market investment banking firm focused on mergers and acquisitions, to bolster its healthcare advisory services. The announcement was made in New York on March 20, 2025. This strategic addition aims to enhance the firm's capabilities in the healthcare sector, catering to the growing demand for specialized expertise in clinical trials. Sonneborn brings a wealth of experience and knowledge to the firm, consolidating its position in the industry. Her appointment signifies a significant step in expanding MidCap Advisors' offerings to clients seeking guidance in healthcare investments. This move underlines the firm's commitment to providing comprehensive and expert-driven solutions in the dynamic healthcare landscape.

news.headline: EBSWare launches global stock market expansion for white-label solution through xTrader, empowering brokers worldwide.

This unit is designated for the Aberdeen Hydrogen Hub project situated in the north-east region of Scotland. The project aims to establish a scalable green hydrogen production and storage solution. By implementing these measures, companies can significantly reduce the risk of data loss and financial losses due to cyber incidents. Protect your systems with cutting-edge security technologies to stay resilient against evolving cyber threats.

(FOA), known for providing home equity-based financing solutions for retirement, has appointed Andrew Essex and ex U.S. Senator Cory Gardner to its Board of Directors. With the recent additions, the board gains vast experience in marketing, public policy, and strategic growth. This move aims to enhance the company's leadership team as they aim to broaden their influence in assisting senior homeowners. FOA is listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol FOA.

news.headline: Cizzle Brands secures 5-year title sponsorship for CWENCH All Canadian Basketball Games, promoting CWENCH Hydration in athletics. (Characters: 136)
news.summary: In Toronto, Cizzle Brands Corporation (Cboe Canada: CZZL) (OTCQB: CZZLF) (Frankfurt: 8YF) has revealed that CWENCH Hydration™, its primary brand, is increasing visibility in Canadian athletics. The brand has secured a five-year title sponsorship deal for the CWENCH All Canadian Basketball Games, an NBA-sanctioned event for Canadian senior high school basketball players. The event spans three days, starting on Friday, April 4, 2025, and continuing through the weekend.

The company is recognized for its work in behind-the-meter projects. The rebranding comes into effect immediately.

Dr. Gavin Setzen, Dr. Siobhan Kuhar, Dr. Lawrence Kaufman, Dr. Nora Perkins, Dr. Robert Adelson, and Dr. Jessica Riccio were recognized as the top specialists and sub-specialists for 2025. news.headline: ADS-TEC Energy to showcase ultra-fast EV charging platform, ChargeBox, with 320kW power at EV Charging Summit, saving operators 65% on peak usage.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, ADS-TEC Energy (NASDAQ: ADSE) will showcase its EV charging platform, ChargeBox, at booth 733 during the EV Charging Summit & Expo on March 26-27, 2025, held at the Westgate Resort Hotel. The innovative ChargeBox can deliver up to 320kW charging power, allowing vehicles to be charged within minutes. This battery-buffered technology offers flexibility and can save operators up to 65% on peak energy costs.

news.headline: Netography partners with Wiz to enhance WIN platform for better security against malicious activity targeting assets.
news.summary: In Annapolis, Maryland, Netography, a holistic network security and observability company, has announced an enhanced partnership with cloud security provider Wiz and its Wiz Integrations (WIN) platform. Through this collaboration, Netography will boost WIN by broadening the range of data it can ingest from the Wiz platform using the Netography Fusion® platform. This development allows customers to smoothly integrate more Wiz insights into their current detection and response workflows within Fusion. The partnership aims to provide improved security capabilities for users leveraging the combined strengths of Netography and Wiz.

news.headline: Dyadic gets funding from CEPI to use C1 for protein-based vaccine development. GLOBE NEWSWIRE, March 20, 2025.
news.summary: Jupiter, Florida, March 20, 2025 - Dyadic International, Inc., a biotechnology firm (NASDAQ: DYAI), has disclosed receiving a funding award from CEPI to advance the development of protein-based vaccines using C1. The company specializes in the efficient production of proteins for various applications, including human and animal vaccines, therapeutics, as well as non-pharmaceutical sectors like food, nutrition, and wellness. This funding signals a significant step towards enhancing vaccine development technology.

news.headline: NANO Nuclear Energy hires two senior nuclear engineers to advance microreactor development. Talent acquisition drives progress.
news.summary: NANO Nuclear is consistently attracting high-caliber talent to drive the advancement of its groundbreaking microreactor technologies. The company is rapidly expanding its team with top-tier professionals to accelerate the development process. This strategic initiative has enabled NANO Nuclear to assemble a skilled workforce capable of fostering innovation and achieving significant milestones. This influx of talent has bolstered the company's capabilities in research, design, and implementation. As a result, NANO Nuclear is making remarkable progress in the development of its microreactor technologies, increasing its competitive edge in the market.

news.headline: ZenaTech signs 7th LOI to acquire land survey company in Southeast Region; aims to boost AI drone business.
news.summary: ZenaTech, Inc., a technology company specializing in AI drone, Drone as a Service (DaaS), enterprise SaaS, and Quantum Computing solutions, has announced the signing of a Letter of Intent to acquire a seventh land survey engineering company in Florida. This marks the fourth LOI in the Southeast region, with one acquisition already closed in the same area. The acquisition is positioned to be the second closed deal in the Southeast Region upon completion. By establishing two locations in this region, ZenaTech aims to bolster regional development and expand its national DaaS business model. This move will enable the company to offer the speed and precision of AI drone solutions through a convenient subscription or pay-per-use model to a wide range of commercial and government customers. The company is listed on Nasdaq (ZENA), FSE (49Q), and BMV (ZENA).

Cutaia. The call, scheduled for March 25, 2025, at 1:00 p.m. Eastern time (10:00 a.m. Pacific time), is set to discuss the Company's financial performance for the fourth quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2024. news.headline: IceCure collaborating with FDA for ProSense® Cryoablation in early-stage breast cancer; key updates expected.
news.summary: IceCure Medical Ltd., based in Caesarea, Israel, has been collaborating closely with the FDA to obtain a De Novo decision. The company, listed on Nasdaq as ICCM, specializes in developing minimally-invasive cryoablation technology. This innovative approach effectively eradicates tumors by subjecting them to extreme cold temperatures. This partnership with the FDA represents a significant step forward for IceCure Medical, indicating progress in gaining regulatory approval for its groundbreaking medical technology. The collaboration underscores the company's commitment to advancing cancer treatment methods.

news.headline: Circular Protocol, Arculus, and IT Lab collaborate to introduce a blockchain-compliant ecosystem for healthcare providers, offering secure verification and authentication of medical records.
news.summary: The Circular blockchain technology has introduced a groundbreaking infrastructure for establishing the inaugural digital network dedicated to verifying and authenticating medical records and transactions on-chain. This innovative system aims to revolutionize the way medical data is securely managed and accessed, with a primary focus on enhancing transparency and efficiency in healthcare processes. By incorporating blockchain technology, the platform ensures the validity and security of medical information, safeguarding the privacy of individuals while streamlining operations. The initiative marks a significant milestone in the healthcare sector, offering a reliable solution for on-chain verification and authentication of medical records and transactions, ultimately benefiting stakeholders by providing a secure and accessible digital ecosystem.

news.headline: Hyperlink InfoSystem named top NYC app dev company for 2025 as US mobile app market set to exceed $200 billion.

Recent studies indicate that the mobile app industry in the USA is projected to exceed an impressive $200 billion. news.headline: IAB Tech Lab launches Trusted Server, an open-source solution for publishers to regain control amid browser lockdowns.
news.summary: Today in New York, the IAB Tech Lab, a leading global organization for digital advertising standards, introduced Trusted Server. This innovative open-source server-side ad management framework empowers publishers by providing them with full authority over ad monetization during an era of evolving practices. The launch signifies a significant step forward in the digital advertising industry, allowing publishers to enhance their control and decision-making.

news.headline: Yara Board member Tina Lawton buys 840 shares, now owns total of 840 in Yara International ASA.
news.summary: Tina Lawton, a member of the Yara Board of Directors, has acquired 840 shares of Yara. This acquisition brings Lawton's total ownership in Yara International ASA to 840 shares. Additional information regarding the transaction is available in the attached document.

news.headline: Neurocrine Biosciences presents 48-week remission data on INGREZZA for tardive dyskinesia. Majority reached remission threshold. from PRNewswire.
news.summary: A significant proportion of participants achieved a specific remission threshold for Tardive Dyskinesia, independent of their underlying psychiatric disorder. This announcement was made at the 2025 Psychiatry Update Conference in San Diego. Neurocrine Biosciences, Inc. revealed these findings, indicating a promising development in addressing Tardive Dyskinesia. Further details were disclosed at the conference, signaling potential advancements in this field.

news.headline: Bionova Scientific partners with Bionique Testing Laboratories for Mycoplasma Testing Services for Biologics Manufacturing.

This collaboration aims to combine the expertise of these two companies in providing commercial-scale biologics services.
